title: misc: add mypy for type checking
body:
Follow up to: #294 
Related to: #293 

I think that type checking helps to avoid errors and bugs.

In #294 you can see how extensive the topic is and cannot be realised with one PR. Therefore the attempt to make it incremental.

Here pipeline, configuration and a few fixes, so that it becomes transparent which files still need to be fixed in the future.

comments.body:
@inknos @jwhonce PTAL. 

I guess f40 test failures can be ignored given it'll be EOL soon.

> I guess f40 test failures can be ignored given it'll be EOL soon.

@lsm5 sometimes they are just flaky tests in f40, I am tracking them privately
LGTM once the tests pass (I think they will since the failures are unrelated)
